headline: Did Cognizant’s Expanded US$15.5 Billion Buyback and AI Push Just Shift CTSH’s Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, Cognizant Technology Solutions increased its equity buyback authorization by US$2.00 billion to a total of US$15.50 billion, while also highlighting new AI-focused offerings such as Cognizant Secure AI Services and participation in the J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference. The enlarged repurchase plan, paired with Cognizant’s push into secure, enterprise-wide AI and agentic systems, underscores management’s emphasis on both capital returns...

headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Soars 9% on Upcoming Dividends, $2-Billion Buyback Boost
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp. (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the 10 Stocks Making Monster Moves. Cognizant rallied for a third straight day on Monday, jumping 9.05 percent to close at $51.40 apiece, as investor sentiment was bolstered by twin initiatives to boost shareholder value through a combination of dividends and a $2 billion increase in its […]
